global_description: A small, vibrant songbird with a sleek, streamlined body. It features a bright yellow-orange head and underparts, contrasting with bluish-gray wings and back. The bird has a thin, pointed black bill and dark eyes.

part_details.head: Bright yellow-orange, smooth and rounded with dark eyes.
part_details.wings: Bluish-gray, elongated and sleek, contrasting with the body.
part_details.bill: Thin, pointed, black, suitable for insect catching.
part_details.body: Small, streamlined, predominantly yellow-orange with bluish-gray back.

spatial_relations: The yellow-orange head transitions into the bluish-gray back.
The thin black bill protrudes from the front of the head.
The bluish-gray wings extend from the sides of the body.
